overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player moving through a narrow neon-lit market corridor toward a street food vendor. The scene transitions from a tight indoor passage to an open-air food stall with teal neon grill lighting, steam rising from cooking food, and cyberpunk city ambiance visible in the background.

events.description: female NPC walks to the left and exits the frame

agents.ego_description: standing behind a female character holding a cup, then beginning to walk forward as she exits the frame

notable_agents.action: female character with braided hair and white top holding a cup walks left and exits view

purple neon lighting strips illuminating the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow cyberpunk corridor with purple neon lighting. A female NPC stands in front of the camera holding a cup, then walks left and exits the frame. Metal shelving lines the right wall while a food preparation counter sits on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway approaching open stall

events.description: teal neon light from the food stall grill becomes visible ahead in the corridor
approaching the open food stall counter at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow corridor toward the food stall area ahead

notable_agents.action: vendor visible in the distance working at the food stall counter

grill station emitting bright teal neon light

segments.scene_description: Moving through the narrow corridor, the camera approaches a food stall illuminated by teal neon light. The metal shelving recedes to the right while corrugated metal walls line the passage. A vendor becomes visible in the distance working at the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air street food stall with active grill station

events.description: steam rises visibly from the frying pan and grill as food cooks
vendor stirs and adjusts food on the grill using metal tongs

agents.ego_description: standing at the food stall counter watching the vendor cook on the neon-lit grill

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing dark jacket and headband cooking food on the grill, stirring with tongs and adjusting items

entered.detail: active grill with green vegetables and meat cooking under teal neon light
large metal pan with simmering food and serving ladle
red neon signs and Japanese lanterns visible in the street background
shelves with cooking supplies and bottles behind the grill

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at the food stall counter where a vendor cooks on a teal neon-lit grill. Steam rises from a frying pan of simmering food in the foreground. The background reveals a bustling cyberpunk street with red neon signs and lanterns, while the vendor actively tends to the grill using metal tongs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a narrow, neon-lit corridor that opens up into a bustling street food stall. It begins in a tight passage bathed in purple light, where a female NPC holding a cup steps aside to let the camera pass by metal shelving and a preparation counter. As the camera advances, the purple glow gives way to teal neon illumination and the shelving is replaced by corrugated metal walls that lead toward a distant vendor. The scene then expands as the camera arrives at the food stall, where steam rises from a simmering pan on a teal-lit grill. Finally, the view settles on the vendor working with metal tongs against a backdrop of a vibrant cyberpunk street filled with red neon signs and lanterns.
